context.revisionDescription: Two CSS class changes applied to both TSX and PHP files: (1) sm:flex-wrap + sm:w-[calc(50%-1rem)] added to address items in FooterInfo; (2) hover:text-blue changed to hover:text-accent in FooterInfoSocialItem social link anchor.

build.notes: bun run build and lint both pass with zero errors. Pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs) — unchanged from prior run, not introduced by this revision.

lint.notes: No warnings in any Footer block files.

registration.notes: No block.json or registration changes in this revision. Confirmed passing via validate_all.

php.classString: block transition-colors w-6 h-6 no-underline! *:w-6 *:h-6 *:object-contain *:object-center text-white hover:text-accent

tsxPhpSync.manualVerification: All four modified files verified — class strings match exactly between TSX and PHP for both the address container, each address item div, and the social link anchor. The only sync warning (root wrapper InspectorControls vs section) is a known false-positive for this block pattern, unchanged from prior run.
tsxPhpSync.falsePositiveWarning: Root wrapper element mismatch: TSX uses <inspectorcontrols>, PHP uses <section> — known false positive for blocks using InspectorControls as JSX sibling to the rendered section

address_wrap_flex_wrap.description: div with sm:flex-wrap class on address items container
address_wrap_flex_wrap.absentReason: Sections 1 and 3 are empty/minimal footer-info instances with no addresses populated — absence is correct (PHP guards with $hasAddresses check before rendering the container)

address_item_calc_width.description: div with sm:w-[calc(50%-1rem)] class on each address item
address_item_calc_width.absentReason: No address items in those sections — expected

social_link_accent.description: anchor with hover:text-accent class on social links
social_link_accent.absentReason: No social items in those sections — expected

renderedOutput.notes: Page loads and renders correctly. All 7 footer-info sections present across the 6 footer instances. New classes confirmed in rendered HTML via attribute selectors matching Tailwind class names.
